title: Digital Prime Technologies launches digital asset lending platform
message_html: Digital Prime Technologies launches digital asset lending platform ...
snippet: Digital Prime Technologies, a provider of digital asset technology solutions, today announced the launch of Tokenet, its institutional digital asset lending platform, with the first trades now successfully executed on the platform.

title: Sharplink CEO says ETH treasury firms are diverging from Strategy model as Ethereum's tokenization role expands
message_html: Sharplink CEO says ETH treasury firms are diverging from Strategy model as Ethereum's tokenization role expands ...
snippet: Joseph Chalom said growing institutional adoption of tokenization could strengthen Ethereum's role as infrastructure for onchain assets.
